title: Salty O'Rourke
actors: Alan Ladd, Gail Russell, William Demarest
plot: Salty owes money to Doc Baxter, and he and his pal Smitty have one month to pay up. They get a race horse and a disbarred jockey, Johnny Cates, who must fake his identity to race. Johnny and Salty both fall in love with Barbara Br...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
